data.name: Screen_Main_QuitDialogMessage
data.value: Czy na pewno chcesz wyjść z gry?

data.name: Screen_Main_CompetitiveDescription
data.value: Rywalizuj z graczami z całego świata

data.name: Screen_Main_MapEditorDescription
data.value: Utwórz, lub edytuj mapę do dowolnej piosenki, która Ci się podoba

data.name: Screen_Main_DownloadMapsDescription
data.value: Znajdź nowe mapy do grania stworzone przez społeczność

data.name: Screen_Main_TipOpenOptions
data.value: Naciśnięcie kombinacji klawiszy CTRL+O spowoduje otwarcie menu opcji.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipImportMapFiles
data.value: Przeciągnij pliki map (.qp) do gry, aby je zaimportować.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipMapPreview
data.value: Naciśnięcie klawisza F3 podczas wyboru utworu wyświetla podgląd mapy.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipReportBug
data.value: Zauważyłeś błąd? Zgłoś go na naszym GitHub!

data.name: Screen_Main_TipRequestFeatures
data.value: Masz pomysł na nową funkcję? Zgłoś ją na naszym GitHub!

data.name: Screen_Main_TipCreateMap
data.value: Przeciągnij plik .mp3 w grze, aby utworzyć nową mapę!

data.name: Screen_Main_TipRandomSong
data.value: Naciśnięcie klawisza F2 powoduje wybranie losowej mapy.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipPlayercard
data.value: Naciśnięcie klawisza F10 w menu otwiera Twoją kartę gracza.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipScrollSpeed
data.value: Naciśnięcie klawisza F3/F4 podczas rozgrywki zmienia prędkość opadania notek.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipCalibrateOffset
data.value: Twój offset można skalibrować w menu opcji.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipDefaultJudgement
data.value: Standard* jest domyślnym ustawieniem Judgement Window (Okna Tolerancji).

data.name: Screen_Selection_Previewisdisabledinthisgame
data.value: Podgląd jest wyłączony w tej grze!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Scoresonthismapwillbeunranked
data.value: Wyniki na tej mapie nie będą rankingowe!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Thismapisnotsubmittedonline
data.value: This map is not submitted online!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Youmustbeadonatortoaccessthisleaderboard
data.value: Musisz być donatorem, aby mieć dostęp do tej tablicy wyników!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Youmustbeonlinetoaccessthisleaderboard
data.value: Musisz być online, aby uzyskać dostęp do tej tablicy wyników!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Youcannotbeatthisscorewithyourcurrentlyactivatedmodifiers
data.value: Nie możesz zrobić lepszego wyniku z obecnie aktywnymi modyfikatorami!

data.name: Screen_Selection_YourmapisoutdatedPleaseupdateit
data.value: Twoja mapa jest nieaktualna. Zaktualizuj ją!

data.name: Screen_Results_PleasewaitYourscoreisalreadybeingconverted
data.value: Please wait! Your score is already being converted!

data.name: Screen_Results_Accuracygraphtooltip
data.value:
This displays the course of accuracy throughout the score.
If the map was not completed, then it will additionally show the accuracy if all subsequent hits had been Marvelous instead.

data.name: Screen_Results_Ratinggraphtooltip
data.value:
This displays the course of performance throughout the score.
If the map was not completed, then it will additionally show the performance if all subsequent hits had been Marvelous instead.

data.name: Screen_Results_Therewasanissuewhileretrievingthereplayforthisscore
data.value: There was an issue while retrieving the replay for this score!

data.name: Screen_Results_Thereplayforthisscorecouldnotbedownloaded
data.value: The replay for this score could not be downloaded.

data.name: Screen_Results_Pleasewaitwhileyourreplayisbeingexported
data.value: Please wait while your replay is being exported...

data.name: Screen_Results_Anerroroccuredwhileexportingthereplay
data.value: An error occured while exporting the replay!

data.name: Screen_Results_YouhavealreadyfixedyourlocaloffsetforthismapTheresnoneedtodoitagain
data.value: You have already fixed your local offset for this map! There's no need to do it again.

data.name: Screen_Results_Thereisnodatatobeabletofixyourlocaloffset
data.value: There is no data to be able to fix your local offset!

data.name: Screen_Results_Localoffsetchangeconfirmation
data.value: Your local offset for this map will be changed from {0} ms to {1} ms.

data.name: Screen_Results_Localoffsetset
data.value: Local offset for this map was set to {0} ms.

data.name: Screen_Results_FailedtosavelocalscoretothedatabasePleasecheckthelogs
data.value: Failed to save local score to the database. Please check the logs!

data.name: Screen_Results_TherewasanerrorwhensavingyourreplayCheckRuntimelogformoredetails
data.value: There was an error when saving your replay. Check Runtime.log for more details.

data.name: Screen_Results_Thereisnoreplaydataavailabletoconvertthisscore
data.value: There is no replay data available to convert this score!

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplaySongTimeProgressBarTimeNumbers
data.value: Display Song Time Progress Bar Time Numbers

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplayUIElementsOverLaneCovers
data.value: Display UI Elements Over Lane Covers

data.name: Screen_Options_TintHitlightingBasedOnJudgementColor
data.value: Tint Hitlighting Based On Judgement Color

data.name: Screen_Options_LoadSongsFromOtherInstalledGames
data.value: Load Songs From Other Installed Games

data.name: Screen_Options_DetectSongsFromOtherInstalledGames
data.value: Detect Songs From Other Installed Games

data.name: Screen_Options_UseSmoothAudioFrameTimingDuringGameplay
data.value: Use Smooth Audio/Frame Timing During Gameplay

data.name: Screen_Options_UseSmoothAudioStartTimingDuringGameplay
data.value: Use Smooth Audio Start Timing During Gameplay

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplayRankedAccuracyWithCustomJudgements
data.value: Display Ranked Accuracy With Custom Judgements

data.name: Screen_Options_NormaliseScrollVelocityByRatePercentage
data.value: Normalise Scroll Velocity By Rate Percentage

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplayRankedAccuracyForLocalLeaderboards
data.value: Display Ranked Accuracy For Local Leaderboards

data.name: Screen_Download_RecommendDifficultyDescription
data.value: Would you like to find recommended maps around your skill level for the selected game mode?

data.name: Screen_Download_Findnewsongstoplayfromthecommunity
data.value: Find new songs to play from the community

data.name: Screen_Download_NoSongSelectedDescription
data.value: To begin downloading, double-click on a song. Clicking once will allow you to preview the audio. You can use the filters below to narrow down your search.

data.name: Screen_Multi_ConfirmReadyMessage
data.value: Readying up as the host will start the round, are you sure you would like to start without all players ready?

data.name: Screen_Multi_ExitToLobbyMessage
data.value: Are you sure you would like to exit to the lobby?

data.name: Screen_Multi_WaitingForHostToStart
data.value: Waiting for the host to start

data.name: Screen_Multi_ChangeGameNameMessage
data.value: Enter a new name for the multiplayer game...

data.name: Screen_Multi_ChangeGamePasswordMessage
data.value: Enter a new password for the multiplayer game...

data.name: Screen_Multi_UploadUnsubmittedMapsetConfirmMessage
data.value: Would you like to temporarily upload the current mapset for other players to download?

data.name: Screen_Multi_UploadingUnsubmittedMapsetMessage
data.value: Please wait while the mapset is being uploaded...

data.name: Screen_Multi_SuccessfullyUploadedUnsubmittedMapset
data.value: Successfully uploaded unsubmitted mapset for the multiplayer game!

data.name: Screen_Multi_UploadMapsetError
data.value: There was an error while uploading the mapset.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_HeaderDescription
data.value: play a match in real-time with others

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishes
data.value: Please wait until the match finishes before performing this action.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishesBeforeReadying
data.value: Please wait until the match finishes before readying up.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_CannotReadyWithoutMap
data.value: You cannot ready up if you do not have the map!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishesBeforeSelectingMap
data.value: Please wait until the match finishes before selecting another map.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_CannotSelectMapIfNotHost
data.value: You cannot select the map if you aren't host!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishesBeforeSelectingMods
data.value: Please wait until the match finishes before selecting mods.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MustUnreadyToSwitchTeams
data.value: You must unready in order to switch teams!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_CannotSwitchTeamsDuringCountdown
data.value: You cannot switch teams when the countdown timer is active

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MatchInProgress
data.value: Match in progress. Please wait until the next one!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_HostSelectingMap
data.value: Host is currently selecting a map!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MapMissingClickToDownload
data.value: You don't have this map. Click to download!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MapMissingDownloadNotAvailable
data.value: You don't have this map. Download not available!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MapsetAlreadyDownloading
data.value: The mapset is already downloading. Slow down!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MatchStartedMissingMap
data.value: Match started, but we don't have the map!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MatchStartedReferee
data.value: Match started. Click to watch the match live on the web as a referee.

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_NoAvailableOpenGames
data.value: There are no available open games to join.

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_EnterGamePasswordMessage
data.value: Enter the password to join the multiplayer game...

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_JoiningGameMessage
data.value: Connecting to multiplayer game. Please wait...

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_CreateMultiplayerGameMessage
data.value: Fill in the details to create a multiplayer game...

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_ChooseGameNamePlaceholder
data.value: Choose a name for the game...

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_CannotCreateGameWithoutMap
data.value: You cannot create a game without having a map selected!
